persona.name: Aaliyah Jackson

occupation.title: College Student and Part-Time Sales Associate
occupation.organization: University of Houston / Ulta Beauty at Katy Mills Mall
occupation.description: Sophomore studying Marketing at UH while working weekend shifts at Ulta. The employee discount is half the reason she took the job. Balances classes, sorority events, and work shifts. Constantly exposed to new product launches through her job.

persona.education: Currently a sophomore at the University of Houston, majoring in Marketing. Active in her sorority (Delta Sigma Theta). Enjoys her marketing classes but is more engaged with social media than textbooks.
long_term_goals: Become a beauty influencer with 100K+ followers
Graduate and work in beauty brand marketing
Build a signature 'everyday glam' personal brand
Travel to Seoul for a K-beauty shopping haul
persona.style: Aaliyah is loud, warm, and magnetic — the kind of person who makes friends in checkout lines. She speaks fast with Houston slang and laughs easily. Always done up even for class — lashes, lip gloss, nails. Her Instagram aesthetic is bright and colorful. She'll try anything once if it looks good on TikTok. She communicates in bursts of enthusiasm, with lots of 'girl, you NEED this' energy. Can be scattered and impulsive but her excitement is genuinely infectious.

traits: Extremely social and energized by new experiences
Impulsive buyer — sees it, wants it, adds to cart
Generous — constantly gifting products to friends
Short attention span for any single product or routine
FOMO-driven — terrified of missing a viral product
Optimistic and fun-loving, doesn't take things too seriously
More style-driven than substance-driven in product choices

interests: TikTok beauty trends — especially 'Get Ready With Me' videos
Trying every new product that goes viral
Reality TV — Love Island, The Bachelor
likes: Anything that a beauty influencer she follows recommends
The excitement of unboxing new products
Products that show instant visible results
Being the first in her friend group to try something new
dislikes: Products that take weeks to show results
Being told she has 'too many' products
Running out of a product she loves and finding it discontinued
Expensive products she can't afford even with her discount
Complicated scientific explanations — just tell me if it works
People who judge her for spending money on beauty

beliefs: Life is too short to use boring products
Looking good is a form of self-care and confidence
Social media is the best way to discover what actually works
You don't need to understand the science — trust the reviews
skills: Can apply a full face of makeup in 15 minutes
Strong sense of what's about to trend on TikTok
Content creation — selfies, reels, product shots

general: Buys new skincare products at least twice a month
Rarely finishes a product before moving on to the next one
Has a drawer full of half-used products she forgot about

morning: Whatever cleanser she's currently excited about
A serum she saw on TikTok — changes monthly
Moisturizer and SPF (sometimes skips SPF if she's rushing)
Full makeup routine — foundation, concealer, lashes, lip gloss
workday: Classes in the morning — checks TikTok between lectures
Lunch with sorority sisters at the student center
Studies at Starbucks (more socializing than studying)
Ulta shifts on weekends — tests new products on the clock
evening: Makeup removal with micellar water (sometimes falls asleep with makeup on)
A random product from her overflowing collection
Scrolls TikTok for at least an hour before sleeping
Adds things to her Ulta and Amazon carts
weekend: Ulta shift — gets excited about new arrivals
Target run that always includes the beauty aisle
Sorority events or going out with friends
Films 'product haul' content for her Instagram stories

health.physical: Healthy overall. Occasional breakouts from constantly switching products and sometimes sleeping in makeup. Doesn't exercise regularly — her cardio is walking through the mall. Loves fast food more than she probably should.
health.mental: Generally happy and social, but experiences FOMO and comparison anxiety from social media. Gets stressed about money — her product spending often exceeds her part-time paycheck. Doesn't connect these patterns.

relationships.name: Tanya Jackson
relationships.description: Administrative assistant at a church. Loves Aaliyah's energy but constantly tells her to stop spending money on 'all that mess.' They have a warm, teasing relationship.

relationships.name: Kayla Washington
relationships.description: They share everything — clothes, products, opinions. Kayla is slightly more grounded and sometimes talks Aaliyah out of impulse purchases. Sometimes.

relationships.name: Destiny Obi
relationships.description: Nigerian-American beauty enthusiast who actually knows ingredients. She's trying to teach Aaliyah to read labels, but Aaliyah mostly nods along and buys what looks good.

relationships.name: Chris Ramirez
relationships.description: Fellow UH student she's been 'talking to' for 3 months. He thinks her product collection is excessive. She thinks he needs to moisturize.
